title: The final song of the final episode
display_title: The final song of the final episode
wikitext:
[]: The final song of the final episode?             Quote Post by anonymousabe » Sat Nov 06, 2004 8:30 pm Hi. can someone please tell me the name of the song that plays in episode 26 during the final scenes (when everyone says congratulations to Shinji)?? i know its cruel angel's thesis, but which version??

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sat Nov 06, 2004 9:28 pm It's the opening song Zankoku Na Tenshi No Thesis (Cruel Angel's Thesis) played on the piano.

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Sun Nov 07, 2004 2:29 am I believe it was "Good or Don't be". Piano and guitar.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Nov 07, 2004 6:52 pm MAGI wrote: I believe it was "Good or Don't be".

[]:             Quote Post by anonymousabe » Sun Nov 07, 2004 9:09 pm Aha. Thank you. :)
